title: TheRa 3D
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f092f2b614c18c6a0ae507eb7fe2fb775a7f9e2b.png)
##  TheRa 3D ( _Thee-Ra_ )

___

by downloading TheRa 3D your normal minecraft items can be remodel 2D to 3D!

required **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** for trident item

this project originally for personal used but I would like to share
my humble project with everyone and it in "work in progress" and may have a name change in the future.
      
Join discord server for **sneak peek** at progress once in a while
